final:
module ALU_64bit (  
    input [63:0] A,  
    input [63:0] B,  
    input [2:0] op_code,  
    output reg [63:0] invalid_result  
);  
    always @(*) begin  
        case (op_code)  
            3'b000: invalid_result = A + B;        // Addition  
            3'b001: invalid_result = A - B;        // Subtraction  
            3'b010: invalid_result = A & B;        // Bitwise AND  
            3'b011: invalid_result = A | B;        // Bitwise OR  
            3'b100: invalid_result = A ^ B;        // Bitwise XOR  
            default: invalid_result = 64'b0;       // Default case  
        endcase  
    end  
endmodule
